scene: A TRY HARDER poster and a planner and a clock all stamped with big red X marks, big black caps TRY HARDER? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A dartboard with the dart stuck far off to the side missing the bullseye, big black caps WRONG PROBLEM. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A signpost pointing in the backwards opposite direction, big black caps THE OPPOSITE. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A clipboard with a science check mark, big black caps A REAL STUDY. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark on a simple flat background, big black caps NOT WILLPOWER. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
